overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a foggy, neon-lit Night City street at night. The character moves from under an elevated highway through a commercial intersection, passing pedestrians and vehicles in a dystopian urban environment with industrial architecture and prominent vertical neon signage.

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, moving away from the camera

notable_agents.action: car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure overhead with support columns
tall industrial concrete wall running along the left side of the sidewalk
tall street lamp with orange sodium vapor light
rain-slicked concrete sidewalk reflecting the orange street lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet concrete sidewalk beneath an elevated highway overpass. The environment is industrial with a high concrete retaining wall on the left and the multi-lane street on the right. Orange street lamps cast a warm glow through the fog, and distant neon lights are visible ahead.

events.description: exits the covered overpass area into the open street with visible sky and neon signage
passes by pedestrians walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: character continues walking along the sidewalk, approaching a gas station and passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: red-orange structural canopy or awning extending from the building on the left
brightly lit gas station and convenience store with red and blue neon signage
zebra crossing stripes visible on the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into an open commercial area. A red structural canopy appears on the left while a brightly lit gas station becomes visible ahead. The character passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction as they approach a crosswalk at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with prominent neon tower

events.description: character steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street
moving from sidewalk into the open intersection with view of tall neon tower

agents.ego_description: character crosses the street at the crosswalk while looking toward the tall neon-lit tower and surrounding buildings

notable_agents.action: car waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with vertical neon signage and illuminated advertisements rising into the fog
low-rise commercial building with bright green and red neon signage
yellow and white striped construction barricades on the street corner

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide intersection, moving from the sidewalk onto the asphalt crosswalk. A massive neon-lit tower dominates the skyline ahead, while commercial buildings with bright signage line the streets. Vehicles wait at the intersection as the character moves through the open plaza-like space.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with multiple neon signs

events.description: camera pans slightly to reveal different angles of the intersection and surrounding buildings

agents.ego_description: character continues walking through the intersection area, navigating around the open space while observing the surroundings

entered.detail: large industrial building with metal scaffolding and green neon signage

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the open intersection, with the camera panning to show various angles of the dystopian cityscape. The tall neon tower shifts to the left as the character progresses, revealing more industrial buildings with scaffolding and bright signage. Vehicles move through the intersection as the character navigates the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial underpass into a sprawling, neon-drenched urban intersection. It begins with the character walking along a wet concrete sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, where orange street lamps cast a warm glow through a dense fog. As the character emerges from the overpass, the environment opens into a commercial area featuring a red structural canopy and a brightly lit gas station, with pedestrians passing by as they approach a crosswalk. The scene then expands as the character crosses the wide asphalt intersection, moving toward a massive neon-lit tower that dominates the skyline amidst a cluster of bright commercial signage. Finally, the camera pans across the dystopian cityscape, shifting the tower to the left to reveal industrial buildings with scaffolding and moving vehicles as the character navigates the open plaza.
